title: Complete compiler v3 conversion and immutable storage
forbidden_changes: Overwriting an existing Capsule or bundle version
Skipping digest verification when metadata is missing
Using panic or unchecked slicing on legacy input
deliverables: Fallible loss-preserving VideoCapsule to ExchangeBundle conversion
Conversion storage and corruption regression tests
acceptance_tests: Short and non-ASCII legacy identifiers never panic
Legacy model output without content-bound anchors is retained as unsupported Claims with provenance and explicit Gaps
Invalid converted bundles are rejected before persistence
Concurrent inserts allocate distinct immutable versions
Missing or corrupt version metadata fails closed
All compiler_v3 unit and conformance tests pass
security_requirements: All untrusted conversion input must return structured errors
Stored bytes must match a mandatory indexed digest
Conversion must apply unknown private rights and must not fabricate anchor content digests
Bundle validation and external trust semantics must remain unchanged
